title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems already understand users, may be conscious, and that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected. He expresses concern that society is not adequately addressing the risks posed by rapid AI progress and advocates for regulation as essential governance.
